data.title: NowVertical Group Wins 2026 Google Cloud Data & Analytics Partner of the Year for Latin America
data.description: Today, NowVertical Group Inc. (TSXV: NOW) was announced as the 2026 Google Cloud Data & Analytics Partner of the Year for Latin America, marking the second year in a row the company has received this award. As a leading data and AI solutions provider, NowVertical has solidified its reputation as a premier partner for Google Cloud in the region. This recognition underscores the company's expertise and excellence in providing data and analytics services.

data.title: Aktis Oncology Announces Presentation of First Clinical Imaging and Dosimetry Data for AKY-2519 at the 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Aktis Oncology, Inc. (NASDAQ: AKTS) disclosed that they will be showcasing clinical imaging and dosimetry data of AKY-2519 in patients with different B7-H3 expressing solid tumors at the 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting in Chicago. The company, a clinical-stage oncology firm striving to unlock the potential of targeted radiopharmaceuticals for broader populations, aims to address groups not currently catered to by existing technologies. The event, scheduled from May 29 to June 2, 2026, will feature two poster presentations highlighting the research outcomes.

data.title: Greenlane Holdings Announces Upcoming Pre-Funded Warrant Conversion and Lock-Up of Strategic Advisor Warrants
data.description: Berachain Investment Corporation has opted to convert 33,085 out of a total of 1,476,464 Pre-Funded Warrants in order to adhere to the contractual beneficial ownership restrictions.

data.title: Chord Energy Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Houston-based energy company Chord Energy Corp. (Nasdaq: CHRD) is set to disclose its financial and operating performance for the first quarter of 2026 on May 5, 2026, following the market closure. A live webcast and conference call will be held the next day, inviting stakeholders to delve into the results.

data.title: Trilogy Metals Announces Commencement of Permitting for High-Grade Arctic Copper-Zinc-Lead-Gold-Silver Project in Alaska
data.description: Ambler Metals is set to launch a comprehensive exploration and development field program in May, which is fully funded. An independent economic impact study has emphasized the significant advantages of the Arctic region in Alaska and the Northwest Arctic area. The program is expected to bring in substantial benefits to the region. All financial figures are denominated in U.S. dollars unless specified otherwise.

data.title: Nationwide helps deliver professional women's soccer to Columbus in celebration of the company's centennial year
data.description: Today in Columbus, Ohio, it was revealed that Nationwide, Haslam Sports Group, and the Edwards family have successfully secured a National Women's Soccer League (NWSL) franchise. This collaboration has led to the establishment of a new professional women's soccer club in Columbus. The joint effort between the three entities has resulted in the awarding of the NWSL franchise, marking a significant milestone in the city's sports landscape. This development signals the introduction of a competitive women's soccer team in Columbus, expanding the opportunities for female athletes in the region.

data.title: CIVISTA BANCSHARES, INC. ANNOUNCES SECOND QUARTER COMMON DIVIDEND
data.description: In Sandusky, Ohio, on April 21, 2026, Civista Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ:CIVB) shared that their Board of Directors has given the green light for a quarterly dividend of 18 cents per common share. The dividend remains the same as the previous quarter and will be payable to shareholders recorded as of May 5...

data.title: DFIN to Announce First-Quarter Results and Host Investor Conference Call on May 5, 2026
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Donnelley Financial Solutions (NYSE: DFIN) announced that they are scheduling a conference call and webcast to discuss the financial results of the first quarter of fiscal year 2026. The event is set to take place on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern time. During the call, they will also provide a business update and address any related queries.

data.title: Driven Brands Receives Expected Notification of Deficiency from Nasdaq Related to Delayed Filing of Annual Report on Form 10-K for Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: Charlotte-based Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: DRVN) has revealed that it was notified by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC ("Nasdaq") on April 15, 2026, about non-compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) due to a delay in filing its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the period ended December 27, 2025. The company received this notice and is taking necessary actions to address the issue promptly.

data.title: 908 Devices Appoints Kola Otitoju as Chief Business & Strategy Officer and Announces an Inducement Grant Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: BURLINGTON, Massachusetts - 908 Devices Inc. (Nasdaq: MASS), known for producing handheld devices for chemical analysis, has welcomed Kola Otitoju as the Chief Business & Strategy Officer, a brand-new leadership role. Mr. Otitoju will be responsible for directing product and corporate strategies, overseeing business development, mergers and acquisitions, as well as leading partnership efforts as the company looks to broaden its market reach in public health, safety, and defense-tech sectors.

data.title: Motorsport Games Announces Adjournment of Annual Meeting of Shareholders Due to Lack of Quorum
data.description: Motorsport Games Inc. (NASDAQ: MSGM), based in Miramar, Fla., shared that its annual shareholder meeting held on April 21, 2026, was reconvened and adjourned at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The meeting, focusing on the racing game developer's operations, could not proceed as planned due to not meeting the necessary quorum.

data.title: GRAIL to Present New Data From NHS-Galleri and PATHFINDER 2 at 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting
data.description: New findings from the NHS-Galleri trial and PATHFINDER 2 study will be disclosed in upcoming oral presentations. These late-breaking abstracts will unveil comprehensive results from the trials, encompassing data from over 174,000 participants collectively. The large participant pool signifies a robust and extensive research effort, aimed at advancing our understanding of the subjects under investigation.

data.title: Weatherford Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Non-GAAP refers to financial measures that exclude certain items to provide a clearer understanding of an organization's performance. This reconciliation helps stakeholders compare the organization's financial performance according to Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP) with the Non-GAAP figures. By excluding specific items, Non-GAAP measures aim to present a more accurate depiction of the company's financial health, facilitating better decision-making for investors, analysts, and other interested parties.

data.title: Primoris Services Corporation Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: Primoris Services Corporation (NYSE: PRIM) scheduled to disclose its first quarter 2026 financial outcomes on May 5, 2026, post market closure. The press release will be uploaded to www.prim.com. Following this, a conference call and webcast will be conducted by management on May 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. U.S. Central Time (10:00 a.m. U.S. Eastern Time) to address the Company's performance.

data.title: Coeur Mining, Inc. Announces Expiration and Final Results of Previously Announced Exchange Offer and Consent Solicitation for New Gold Senior Notes
data.description: Coeur Mining, Inc. revealed the outcomes of its private exchange offer to certain Eligible Holders, concerning the US$400,000,000 aggregate principal amount of 6.875% Senior Notes due 2032 issued by New Gold Inc. The offer was made for all outstanding Existing Notes. The company, listed on NYSE and TSX under the symbol CDE, informed about the completion of this Exchange Offer. The Senior Notes in question carry a 6.875% interest rate and are due in 2032. The CUSIP numbers for these notes are 644535 AJ5 / C62944 AE0, while the ISIN numbers are US644535AJ57 / USC62944AE04.

data.title: Toll Brothers to Acquire Private Home Builder in Northwest Arkansas
data.description: Luxury home builder Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL) recently disclosed its plan to purchase most assets of Buffington Homes of Arkansas, a private home builder situated in Fayetteville, Arkansas. The agreement, set to be finalized in Toll Brothers' fiscal third quarter, signifies a significant move in the industry. Toll Brothers is set to solidify its position as the leading luxury home builder in the nation with this strategic acquisition.

data.title: ProstACT Global Phase 3 (Part 1) Selected as Late-Breaking Abstract at ASCO 2026
data.description: Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited disclosed safety and tolerability findings from the ProstACT Global Phase 3 study (Part 1) in an announcement made on April 22, 2026. The data will be shared through a late-breaking oral presentation at the 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting scheduled from May 29 to June 2, 2026, in Chicago, IL. Telix operates under the stock symbols ASX: TLX and NASDAQ: TLX. This marks a significant step in presenting vital research insights to the global medical community.
